name: Fred's German Potato Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 8 red potatoes, peeled and cut into fourths
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the potatoes into fourths and fry them in a kettle of oil until hot.
2. Mash the fried potatoes thoroughly.
3. Cool the mashed potatoes in the refrigerator.
4. When cooled, transfer the mashed potatoes to one end of an 8 × 13 × 2‑inch cake or lasagne pan.
5. Spread the potatoes to cover the pan about 2 inches deep.
6. Add an equal amount of flour as there is potatoes to the other end of the pan and sprinkle with salt to taste.
7. Mix the potatoes and flour together well using floured hands.
8. Form the mixture into balls, each about 2–2 1/2 inches in diameter.
9. Bring a kettle of water to a rolling boil.
10. Dust the dumplings with additional flour and add them one at a time to the boiling water.
11. Boil for 20–30 minutes.
